_DOCUMENTATION._purpose: This config controls the upload interview system's AI behavior
_DOCUMENTATION._usage: Loaded by interview.py and used for model selection and settings

interview._comment: Interview phase - AI interacts with user to understand table structure and validation requirements
interview._note_model_role: BACKUP VALUE — model[] is used only if model_config.csv is unavailable. At runtime, model_role resolves the actual model from model_config.csv. Edit the CSV to change the model, not this field.
interview._note_web_search: Web search is disabled for interview phase - fast local analysis only
